items.title: Ajax heeft vooralsnog gegokt en verloren: 'Zelfs Henderson kwam in beeld'
items.summary: Hoewel Ajax zich versterkte met Oleksandr Zinchenko, Maarten Paes, Maher Carrizo en Takehiro Tomiyasu, zijn de Amsterdammers al twee transferwindows op zoek naar een vervanger voor de inmiddels vertrokken Jordan Henderson, die de nummer 6-positie met verve invulde en op het veld leiding gaf aan het elftal. Clubwatcher Lentin Goodijk vertelt in deze video dat de Engelsman zelfs gepolst is voor een terugkeer en noemt de andere namen die in beeld waren, maar waarbij het uiteindelijk telkens niet tot een transfer naar Ajax leidde.

items.title: Palace criticised for 'messing' with McNeil mental health
items.summary: Dwight McNeil's partner criticises Crystal Palace for "messing" with his mental health after the collapse of his transfer from Everton.

items.title: Wintertransfers Eredivisie seizoen 2025/26: alle clubs op een rij
items.summary: De transferperiode is weer losgebarsten. In dit overzicht van VI vind je alle afgeronde, door clubs bevestigde, wintertransfers van de achttien Eredivisie-clubs. Clubs in Nederland kunnen tot en met 3 februari spelers aantrekken .

items.title: Winter Olympics: Skiing icon Vonn to compete in Milan-Cortina with 'completely ruptured' ACL
Ajax-aanwinst Maher Carrizo: grillig talent met hoog plafond
items.summary: Op zoek naar versterking voor de aanvallende vleugels is Ajax uitgekomen bij Maher Carrizo (19). De linksbenige rechtsvoor heeft in korte tijd bekendheid verworven bij Vélez Sarsfield, door opvallend makkelijk te scoren. Analyse van de nieuwe buitenspeler van Aja x, een vleugelflitser met intrigerende potentie en een paar duidelijke verbeterpunten.

items.title: Transfers Ajax: Beuker ziet in Carrizo speler met veel potentie
items.summary: VI volgt het transfernieuws bij Ajax op de voet, zeker nu de winterse transferwindow in aantocht is. De doelwitten van de Amsterdammers, duiding van de clubwatcher, of aandacht in buitenlandse media. We verzamelen alles hier.

items.title: Officieel: Ajax rondt komst Carrizo af op Deadline Day
items.summary: Maher Carrizo mag zich officieel speler van Ajax noemen. De negentienjarige Argentijn komt over van Vélez Sarsfield en tekent tot medio 2030 in Amsterdam.

items.title: Sandro Tonali ‘happy’ at Newcastle but Howe ‘not in control’ of Italian’s future
items.summary: Tonali linked to Arsenal on last day of transfer window ‘Almighty challenge’ to reach Carabao Cup final Eddie Howe has admitted he is “not in control” of Sandro Tonali’s future, but Newcastle’s manager believes the Italy midfielder remains happy on Tyneside. A quiet transfer deadline day at St James’ Park featured swiftly crushed suggestions that Arsenal were poised to bid for Tonali. There were fears it could be a precursor to a possibly agent-led initiative to move the midfielder this summer. Howe, perhaps fearing a repeat of the debilitating saga that led to Alexander Isak’s departure for Liverpool in the summer, held talks on Monday with his £55m signing. Continue reading...

items.title: Why Liverpool's January transfer window makes no sense
items.summary: Liverpool's lack of depth in defense has been a known issue since last summer, with stars such as Virgil van Dijk playing every game. So why didn't they add reinforcements in January?

items.title: Transfer window winners and losers: How Man City, Liverpool, PSG, others fared
items.summary: Deadline day was extremely quiet and the winter transfer window as a whole had its share of perplexing moves.

items.title: Celtic's O'Neill 'very interested' in Oxlade-Chamberlain
items.summary: Celtic manager Martin O'Neill says he would be "very interested" in signing free agent Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain, but reckons the former Liverpool and Arsenal midfielder has lots of options.

items.title: 'Grumpy' Guardiola jokes about Man City spending
items.summary: Pep Guardiola mischievously said he is "a little bit sad and upset" that Manchester City have only the seventh highest net spend on transfers in the Premier League over the last five years.

items.title: Pep: Pressure on City's big-spending PL rivals
items.summary: Pep Guardiola has said the pressure is on six of Manchester City's Premier League rivals to win more trophies because they have had a higher net spend.

items.title: Fener blame Al Ittihad for Kante transfer fiasco
items.summary: N'Golo Kanté's switch from Al Ittihad to Fenerbahce has collapsed, the day after the transfer window closed.

items.title: Benzema joins Al Hilal from Al Ittihad
items.summary: Karim Benzema has left Al Ittihad and signed a contract with Saudi Pro League rivals Al Hilal, the club announced Monday.

items.title: Mateta faces uncertain future for club and country
items.summary: BBC Sport looks at what next for Jean-Philippe Mateta after his dream move to AC Milan broke down over issues with his medical

items.title: 'Pain of failure will drive change' - Williams reveal 'bold' livery for delayed car
items.summary: Williams have revealed a reworked livery for the 2026 Formula 1 season.

items.title: The talented playmaker no-one seems to want
items.summary: Harvey Elliott is one of England's most gifted young players - but neither Aston Villa or Liverpool appear to rate the midfielder.

items.title: Newey: Aston Martin on 'back foot' by four months
items.summary: Aston Martin boss Adrian Newey has revealed his team have been on the "back foot" by four months.
